steps.name: map
steps.prompt: Map the code to be refactored. Identify all call sites, tests, and contracts that must be preserved. Do not edit files.

steps.name: plan
steps.prompt: Design a safe, incremental refactor plan. Identify risks, preserve existing tests, and end with: "## Plan Complete".

steps.name: execute
steps.prompt: Execute the refactor plan. Make mechanical changes first, then update tests. Summarize what moved or changed.

steps.name: verify
steps.prompt: Run the verifier bus and the full test suite to confirm behavior is preserved. Report pass/fail and any corrections made.
